case_title: ELLIS STREET ASSOCIATES, A CALIFORNIA LIMITED VS. SEAN CASEY et al

calendar.matters:
MASTER CALENDAR JURY
Off Calendar Nov-27-2002 Vacated

MANDATORY SETTLEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Nov-27-2002 Off Calendar
MINI MINUTES: Cause assigned to Dept. 218 for Settlement Conference. Present: Commissioner Loretta M. Norris; Clerk: P. Dias; Reporter: Lois Jones. Michael S. Rossoff, Esq. appeared for the Plaintiff, Ellis Street Associates, also present, Arnicca, Agent for Ellis Street Associates. Defendant, Sean Casey appeared in pro per. The matter settled per stipulation of parties which is read into the record. Trial date is vacated.
